patterns.name: Missing IPv4 address
patterns.description: The network adapter does not appear to have a usable IPv4 address.

patterns.name: Missing default route
patterns.description: No default route was detected, which can prevent internet connectivity.

patterns.name: Suspected MTU/MSS path issue
patterns.description: Large packets may fail while smaller packets succeed, which can indicate MTU, MSS, fragmentation, or path MTU discovery problems.
